name: Krong Karawek
overview: Wrongly accused of stealing his family’s heirloom diamond, Adisak falls from grace and is forced into a life of hardship. Determined to clear his name, his daughter Khwanta returns to Suriyakan Palace to uncover the truth and restore her family’s honor, with the help of Prakan, the son of a publishing house owner.

trailers.title: เมื่อ “เครื่องเพชรประจำตระกูล” หายปริศนา เขาต้องหาทางกู้คืนศักดิ์ศรี | กรงการเวก | 10 ก.พ.68 | one31
